The patient is receiving various medications, including Tacrolimus, Vancomycin HCl, Heparin Flush PICC, Morphine Sulfate, Sulfameth/Trimethoprim DS, Lorazepam, Sodium Chloride 0.9% Flush, Fluconazole, Ibuprofen, Ascorbic Acid, Zinc Sulfate, Amlodipine, Prednis
